creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
Update to version 0.2 and include Max's suggestion.

--- 2009-03-01-plasma-applet-yawp.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	plasma-applet-yawp
#	plasma-applet-yawp/Makefile
#	plasma-applet-yawp/distinfo
#	plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-descr
#	plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-plist
#
echo c - plasma-applet-yawp
mkdir -p plasma-applet-yawp > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - plasma-applet-yawp/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >plasma-applet-yawp/Makefile << '068943a1970279c70aa6ac28842982d8'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	plasma-applet-yawp
X# Date Created:				2009-01-15
X# Whom:					Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	yawp
XPORTVERSION=	0.2
XCATEGORIES=	deskutils kde
XMASTER_SITES=	http://marian.kyralovi.cz/data/${PORTNAME}/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	plasma-applet-
X
XMAINTAINER=	bsdkaffee@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	Weather plasma applet for KDE4
X
XUSE_BZIP2=	yes
XUSE_CMAKE=	yes
XUSE_KDE4=	automoc4 kdeprefix kdelibs
XUSE_QT_VER=	4
XQT_COMPONENTS=	gui dbus network opengl svg webkit xml \
X		qmake_build moc_build rcc_build uic_build
XUSE_GETTEXT=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
068943a1970279c70aa6ac28842982d8
echo x - plasma-applet-yawp/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >plasma-applet-yawp/distinfo << 'b8180332453c63ef7db632a4a003f314'
XMD5 (yawp-0.2.tar.bz2) = d141d22ed3b957cdcb68266fb802ee4e
XSHA256 (yawp-0.2.tar.bz2) = 72f213893ba119757f6a1704a58ca6eeb07f84dcbbfab20027fa551cdda25f95
XSIZE (yawp-0.2.tar.bz2) = 861761
b8180332453c63ef7db632a4a003f314
echo x - plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-descr << '77741fd1ef5f81e6ea666fbb9dc5a187'
XyaWP (Yet Another Weather Plasmoid) is a plasma applet for KDE4 that displays
Xweather information on your desktop.
X
XWWW: http://www.kde-look.org/content/show.php?content=94106
77741fd1ef5f81e6ea666fbb9dc5a187
echo x - plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-plist << '7a53f8a795531ffb3112837a64a2117b'
Xlib/kde4/plasma_yawp.so
Xshare/apps/desktoptheme/default/widgets/yawp_theme13.svg
Xshare/kde4/services/plasma_yawp.desktop
Xshare/locale/af/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/sk/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
Xshare/locale/sl/LC_MESSAGES/plasma_applet_yawp.mo
7a53f8a795531ffb3112837a64a2117b
exit
--- 2009-03-01-plasma-applet-yawp.shar ends here ---
